name: eva
description: Eight composable, scope-adaptive Claude Code skills for compound engineering: brainstorm a PRD, spec the design, cross-review the pair, diagnose bugs, execute via red-green-refactor TDD, review the diff with a multi-reviewer pipeline, commit-push with safety gates, and capture durable learnings — each skill produces a single cold-readable artifact (PRD / SPEC / REVISION / DIAGNOSIS / EXECUTION / CODE-REVIEW / SOLUTIONS) and is gated on explicit user approval before any write. Refuses protected branches, never opens PRs, never `git add -A`, never `--force`, never `--no-verify`, never commits secrets.
